title: The Missions to Foreign Rulers
description: In this year the Messenger of God sent out messengers.420 He sent out six persons in the month of Dhd al-Hijjah,421 three of them setting out together: Haxib b. Abi Balta'ah of Lakhm, a confederate of the Band Asad b. 'Abd al-'Uzza, to al-Mugawgis;422 Shuja' b. Wahb of the Band Asad b. Khuzaymah, a confederate of Harb b. Umayyah and veteran of Badr, to al-Ilarith b. Abi Shimr al[156o] Ghassani;423 and Dihyah b. Khalifah al-Kalbi to Caesar 424 He sent out Salil b. 'Amr al-'Amiri (of 'Amin b. Lu'ayy) to Hawdhah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
